headline: Jim Cramer on ServiceNow: “I Don’t Think That It’s Going to Have a Huge Year”
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) was among the stocks Jim Cramer discussed in this changing market. A caller inquired whether now is the time to buy the stock, noting that the multiple is down and that Cramer respects CEO Bill McDermott. He replied: I think the stock is bottoming. I don’t think that it’s going to have […]

headline: Is Intuit’s Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
summary: While Intuit has struggled to keep up with the broader S&P 500 Index over the past year, Wall Street analysts remain highly bullish about the stock’s prospects.

headline: ServiceNow (NOW) Climbs 14% Ahead of Business Updates
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the 10 Stocks With Explosive Returns. ServiceNow extended its winning streak to a third straight session on Friday, climbing 14.38 percent to close at $124.37 apiece, as investors continued to load up portfolios ahead of business announcements next week.
